title: Selected Work
subtitle: Consumer product design, design systems at scale, marketplace UX, and design leadership — selected for mobile.de

application.positioning: Consumer Product Design · Design Systems at Scale · Marketplace UX · Design Leadership

selection_rationale.bibeltv-app-redesign: Primary consumer story: a polished multi-platform app redesign for a real audience. Closest analogue to mobile.de's large B2C product surface.
selection_rationale.bibeltv-design-system-api: Design systems at scale: API-first token system syncing iOS, Android, web, TV, and Figma from one source. mobile.de runs a large multi-platform product where this kind of infrastructure pays off.
selection_rationale.ninox-org-building: Leadership story for a Product Design Lead role — building and leading a design team, hiring, culture, design-as-a-function.
selection_rationale.ninox-ai-onboarding: AI product design: prompt-to-output UX, model uncertainty, user agency. Relevant as marketplaces add AI-assisted flows (pricing, listing, search).
selection_rationale.spreadshirt-user-research-strategy: Marketplace / e-commerce research and strategy: changing a company's direction with one prototype. Direct marketplace-domain relevance.
selection_rationale.churchdesk-booking-system: Complex workflow simplified to clean UX with measurable outcomes and multi-stakeholder coordination — transferable to marketplace transaction flows.
